name: @ryu/canvas-app
description: The Ryu Canvas app: a ComfyUI / ElevenLabs-Flows-style node board (image/video/chat/tts/stt/upload/note) shipped as a full-page Companion (Path B, ui_format:"html"). Persists as a Space document via spaces:docs; runs nodes through the window.ryu media/agent bridge; built to one self-contained HTML via vite-plugin-singlefile.
